input.title: The Algorithm
input.description: A documentary about three families suing a social media company after their children were harmed by algorithmically recommended content. Over 18 months, the film follows the lawsuit through depositions, expert testimony, and the families' daily lives — revealing how recommendation systems work and who is accountable when they fail.
input.comps: The Social Dilemma (Netflix, 2020), All the Beauty and the Bloodshed (HBO, 2022)
input.status: In production. 8 months of footage shot. Two families confirmed; third in negotiation.

input.title: The Beekeeper
input.description: A portrait of an 80-year-old beekeeper in rural Montana who has kept bees for sixty years and refuses to use modern chemicals.

input.title: Night Train
input.description: A documentary series following the overnight sleeper trains of Europe — Berlin to Paris, Vienna to Rome, Stockholm to Hamburg — and the people who ride and operate them. Part travel documentary, part social portrait, the series explores what happens when strangers share a confined space for twelve hours and what the revival of night trains says about Europe's relationship to time, distance, and sustainability.
input.comps: Slow Train Through Africa (Channel 4), The Trans-Siberian Railway (BBC)
input.status: Development. Director attached. Test filming completed on Berlin-Paris route. No financing in place.
input.awards: Project selected for Sunny Side of the Doc Forum 2026
